description: Explicit UI contract for the Sovereign portal /catalog route.

header.title: National catalog
header.subtitle_template: All registry entries across ${jurisdictionName} sovereign operations.
header.subtitle_default: All registry entries across Mauritian sovereign operations.

no_rows.body_text: No registered resources yet. Onboard providers to populate the national catalog.

non_negotiables: No StatCards and no FilterBar on this page in v0.4.
Risk cell uppercases the value (HIGH / MED / LOW) at render time AND colour-codes it.
Risk colour map is fixed: high=#ef4444, med=#f59e0b, low=#10b981.
Sector cell is a single string in v0.4 (e.g. 'education', 'cross-cutting'); production may evolve to multi-sector.
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
This page is a SUBSET of admin's resource catalogue — only entries relevant to the active sovereign tenant.
